data.title: Tianyuan
data.synopsis:
Chen Qingyuan, the foremost prodigy of the Northern Wilderness, stepped into the forbidden zone "Tianyuan" a century ago. His soul lamp extinguished, and the world believed him dead. A hundred years later, he emerged alive from the forbidden zone, but his cultivation was completely destroyed, and his past remained a mystery. A mysterious woman in red within Tianyuan made a pact with him, offering two choices: "Marry me" or fulfill nine promises. Chen Qingyuan decisively chose the latter. What he thought was the beginning of a miserable, backbreaking life turned out to be a destiny-bound journey filled with crazy buffs.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Mu Xiao San Sheng's (沐潇三生) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Wo You Yi Jian
data.synopsis:
A fallen prince unexpectedly obtains an ancient divine sword, fights his way through the three realms, and ultimately rises to godhood!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Qingluan Feng Shang's (青鸾峰上) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Nanayoubi
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Nanayoubi by U-zhaan x Tamaki Roy x Chinza Dopeness.

data.title: Ta Xing
data.synopsis:
A scientific expedition from Blue Star discovered a strange humanoid corpse exposed in a vacuum on the planet Minglong. The expedition brought it back to Blue Star for research, but unexpectedly, they also brought disaster. The energy emanating from the humanoid corpse caused the entire Blue Star biosphere to enter a state of supernatural evolution. Fortunately, the humans on Blue Star were also within the biosphere and entered the supernatural evolutionary sequence, successively evolving into: Human-level, Earth-level, and Celestial-level evolvers. The seven most powerful Celestial-level evolvers were known as the Seven Sages of Hanxia, ​​protecting Hanxia in this chaotic world fraught with calamities. The anomalies on Blue Star attracted the attention of the Great Yu Empire, which ruled this star field. The Great Yu Empire believed that these anomalies might be related to a fugitive they were hunting. Therefore, taking advantage of the emergence of the Tenth Academy of the Starry Sky, they issued an academy trial, attracting a large number of students from combat academies to Blue Star under the guise of trials to find the fugitive and hone their new blood. 

On Blue Star, a young man named Lu Yin lies in hiding. He is unaware of his identity and origins; his earliest memories are of a bloody massacre, leaving him alone and stranded on Blue Star. As Blue Star undergoes a dramatic transformation, he realizes this is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. He needs a clean new identity to return to that dangerous starry sea and seek revenge for the blood debts of the past. Thus, Lu Yin, the Seven Sages of Hanxia, ​​students of the Great Yu Empire, and various other forces enter the scene. On Blue Star, an unprecedented evolution and hunt is about to begin.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

titles.title: Lupin the IIIrd: Zenigata to Futari no Lupin
LUPIN THE IIIRD 銭形と2人のルパン
Lupin the IIIrd: Zenigata and the Two Lupins

data.title: Lupin the IIIrd: Zenigata to Futari no Lupin
data.title_english: Lupin the IIIrd: Zenigata and the Two Lupins
data.title_japanese: LUPIN THE IIIRD 銭形と2人のルパン
data.synopsis: Prequel to Lupin the IIIrd the Movie: Fujimi no Ketsuzoku.

data.title: Langlang Shan Xiao Yaoguai
data.synopsis:
Can one embark on a journey to the West without extraordinary abilities? A little pig demon decides to leave Langlang Mountain and team up with a toad demon, a weasel demon, and a gorilla monster to complete their pilgrimage. What trials will the little demons encounter on their westward journey? Will they ultimately be able to achieve their wishes and live the lives they desire?

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

data.title: Wo Wei Dao Zong
data.synopsis:
In a conspiracy, the supreme leader of the martial arts world, Dao Zong, was killed, and the leaders of various gangs were either killed or imprisoned, leaving the martial arts world in chaos. In order to rebuild the order of the martial arts world, Yan Jiyu, the leader of Changfeng Pavilion, sent messengers to various sects, intending to establish a new "righteous" martial arts world headed by him. However, at this time, the fledgling Yang Ren was entrusted to deliver a letter left by Dao Zong. Along the way, he was surrounded by powerful enemies and was extremely dangerous, but he relied on his passion and chivalry to constantly break through himself and defeat his opponents. While his martial arts skills improved rapidly, he also met a group of chivalrous and righteous people. What should the martial arts world look like? Yang Ren couldn't answer, but he knew it was definitely not what Yan Jiyu said. Yang Ren put up a big banner: "Chengfeng Gang", and quickly gathered together.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

data.title: Zeri Feisheng
data.synopsis:
In chaotic times, evil spirits are rampant and treacherous people are in power. At the same time, the underworld invaded, and the forces of the two worlds poisoned the human world. The snake catcher Xu Ying could not stand and watch the gods working for the underworld oppress the common people, so he rebelled and committed the crime of killing the gods. He also killed the court officials who did nothing. He was hunted down by the forces of the two worlds and began his life of escape...

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

data.title: Yamakawa Junichi Anime Gekijou
data.synopsis: Masaki Michishita, a gay boy attending a preparatory school, finds himself having the urge to pee. He races to the nearest toilet that happens to be in a park, famous for being a gay meet-up spot. He notices Takakazu Abe sitting on a bench in the park and without thinking he says, “Uho! That’s a good man…” As they stare at each other, Takakazu starts unzipping his blue jumpsuit…
data.background: Junichi Yamakawa's famous title, Kuso Miso Technique, which became an internet meme, has been given an animated remake. This collection begins with the title that started what was called the "Yamajun Boom," Kuso Miso Technique, while also bringing his other work, Otokogari (Men Hunting), completely to life! "Uho! That's a good anime..."　 Kuso means "shit" in Japanese. Junichi's famous title refers to a Japanese joke where miso and shit look very similar. (Source: Coolmic)

data.title: Yun Shen Buzhi Meng
data.synopsis:
Yun Wangshu's wedding was meant to be the happiest day of her life, but a brutal conspiracy turned it into a nightmare, slaughtering her entire clan. After a narrow escape, she made a desperate deal with the Silent Court. Now, sixty years later, reborn as the merciless Xihe, she's ready to make her enemies bleed for everything they took from her.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Yujin Xingzhe
data.synopsis:
In a quiet village, a young boy named Duanmu Yeyu was once saved by the elite “Hell Hunters” of Ember City. Deeply inspired by these heroes, he vowed to one day become a Hell Hunter himself. As he boards a bus to Ember City to chase his dream, Yeyu is unknowingly swept into a storm of chaos. The main antagonist, Lucifer, sends a bioengineered operative named MIKO-Taiyi to infiltrate Ember City and steal classified data. 

During a fierce battle with the Hell Hunters, Taiyi is severely injured and falls unconscious. Yeyu stumbles upon Taiyi and, unaware of Taiyi's identity, brings Taiyi back to the Hell Hunters’ base for treatment. In the process, Yeyu unintentionally takes a critical mission device from Taiyi. As Yeyu begins his long-awaited trial to join the Hell Hunters, his innocent act sets off a chain reaction. Taiyi, desperate to avoid detection by Ember City forces, must covertly approach Yeyu and retrieve the device. 

Meanwhile, Lucifer dispatches tens of thousands of minions to locate the missing Taiyi. Thus begins a citywide conflict, sparked by a small act of kindness, that threatens to become a battle for Ember City’s very survival.

(Source: iQIYI)
data.background: Adaptation of Mo Xiong's (墨熊) web novel, Diyu Lie Bing (地狱猎兵).

data.title: Xian Chong
data.synopsis:
A hundred years ago, immortal Tian Quan kills the Mirage Lord in a battle, and the Mirage Spirit disappears from the land of Cangshuo. However, Tian Quan's soul becomes incomplete and she loses the memory of the battle. 

After the battle, Tian Quan goes down to the mortal world to work on the land of Cangshuo and adopts the immortal pet bird Li Xiao. Li Xiao quickly transforms into human form, and Tian Quan is moved by how similar Li Xiao’s appearance and behavior are to her former lover Shao Weili. Li Xiao is born with the ability to identify hundreds of herbs, and he goes out to treat illnesses and save people on Tian Quan's behalf. After Tian Quan realizes that Li Xiao has not returned home for days, she goes to Luoyi Town to look for him. To her surprise, all the people in Luoyi Town are killed and the Mirage Spirit has re-appeared. 

Tian Quan and Li Xiao work together to fight against the Mirage and resolves the town’s crisis. As the Tian Quan regains her chaotic memories, she discovers that there is some probable connection between her deceased lover Shao Weili, Li Xiao, and the Mirage she killed...

(Source: iQIYI)

data.title: Sou Shen Ji (ONA)
data.synopsis:
The story takes place in the barbaric era of Yan Emperor and Huang Emperor. Just when many heroes were vying for supremacy in the Central Plains, the world-recognized leader, Emperor Shennong, passed away, and the heroes of the gold, wood, water, fire, and earth tribes were all ready to make a move. 

In the turbulent times, the young boy Tuoba Ye suddenly appeared and by chance obtained the dying inheritance of Emperor Shennong, thus starting a thrilling legendary journey.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Shu Xia Ye Hu's (树下野狐) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Tonari no Kanojo
data.synopsis:
Kyoko and Suji are neighbors. They grew up together, shared bitterness and joy together, and are already more than friends to each other. But the boy is not sure of his desires and does not dare to make the first step.

One day the friends foolishly quarrel. Kyoko disappeared for a few days, and worried about her absence, Suji received a videotape in the mail. In the video, the unknown man showed Kyoko how to build a strong relationship with a girl. The boy turns the video on as an insecure young man, but turns it off as a man who knows what he wants.

data.title: Yogoreta Kanojo
data.synopsis: Azuma Kyouko and her boyfriend are studying with a tutor, and then boyfriend has to go. Kyouko decides to have fun with the tutor, but it's for a sinister purpose...

data.title: Monster (Music, 2025)
data.synopsis:
The theme song for ENigmatic Recollection Chapter 2, The Chains of Fate!

(Source: Official YouTube Channel)

data.title: Cheng Ye Xiao He
data.synopsis:
In the game, Xiao Wujin, the server's top swordsman, and Tao Zhiyao, the most wanted female criminal, meet under unusual circumstances. In reality, Xiao He, the campus heartthrob of Dongchuan University, and Shen Xin, a freshman, meet and become friends through a university e-sports competition. Together with their friend Yang Yao, they form a team, overcoming numerous challenges to win the championship! Xiao He and Shen Xin heal and encourage each other, walking hand in hand on their path to pursuing their dreams. With the help of their friends Yang Yao and Xiang Nan, what sparks will fly between them?

(Source: iQIYI YouTube Channel)

data.title: Qi Guo Yinhe
data.synopsis:
Thousands of years after the fall of the Beichen Dynasty, the sons of destiny from four different forces help each other and grow from dealing with crisis after crisis. They work together to stop the war conspiracy of cutting-edge artificial intelligence.

(Source: iQIYI, Google translated)

data.title: Oden
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Oden by U-zhaan x Tamaki Roy x Chinza Dopeness.

titles.title: Everyday of the 29 years old single person adventurer
The Daily Life of a Single 29-Year-Old Adventurer
An Adventurer's Daily Grind at Age 29

data.title: 29-sai Dokushin Chuuken Boukensha no Nichijou
data.title_english: An Adventurer's Daily Grind at Age 29
title_synonyms: Everyday of the 29 years old single person adventurer
The Daily Life of a Single 29-Year-Old Adventurer
data.synopsis:
Hajime Shinonome is a 29-year-old seasoned adventurer who has long stepped away from the glory of youthful ambition, instead content with his steady life in Komai Village. During a dungeon expedition, he rescues a young girl named Rirui, who was abandoned and nearly consumed by a slime. Driven by memories of a similarly unforgiving past, Hajime takes her under his care. But as Rirui begins to reveal unexpected abilities while adapting to the rhythm of village life, Hajime finds that their shared existence may prove to be more consequential than any other quest he has ever attempted.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Arknights: 2025 Kodomo no Hi Tokubetsu Douga
アークナイツ 「2025こどもの日特別動画」

data.title: Arknights: 2025 Kodomo no Hi Tokubetsu Douga
data.title_japanese: アークナイツ 「2025こどもの日特別動画」
data.synopsis:
She hoped to stay by her daughter's side, and the daughter wished the same.

(Source: Official Youtube)

data.title: Da Tang Chengfeng Lu
data.synopsis:
The notorious divinely-skilled Mu Tianhou was suddenly ambushed, causing a stir in the martial arts world. Two upright disciples, Zheng Dongting and Zu Beiqiu (the useless brothers), met each other because of this. In order to help their younger brother Zu Beiqiu find his wife whom he had not seen for ten years, and also to find the real murderer who killed their master, a famous constable and a rich second-generation accidentally teamed up to venture into the world and embarked on an adventurous journey of delivering a divorce letter for thousands of miles. 

The two came to the Luo family in Yangzhou, but encountered the Luo family's massacre and were mistaken for the murderer. They were called "the two evildoers of Central Plains." Between the two of them, Zheng Dongting has martial arts that he cannot use, while Zu Beiqiu has martial arts that he doesn't know how to use. Although the brothers intend to clear their names, the misunderstandings of the various factions in the martial arts world continue to deepen, and the righteous martial arts people rise up to attack them. After experiencing manny dangerous situations, the two discovered that this was a big conspiracy against them...

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

data.title: Zi Jin: Yu Miao Fang
data.synopsis:
In the Forbidden City, which has a long history and profound cultural heritage, there live many cute cats. From the perspective of humans, they live an enviable and leisurely life. Among them, six royal cats are special. They are responsible for protecting the memory of cultural relics of "Wuhua." They entered the world of Wuhua and defeated the destroyer Black Owl time and time again, bringing the world of Wuhua back on the right track and thus protecting the cultural relics. 

The six imperial cats are Luban and Momo from the literary class, and Shuangmei, Aobai, Pingan and Xiaozai from the martial class. Not only are they intelligent and brave, they also have a tacit understanding. They form the Forbidden City Imperial Cat Room, which protects the national treasures of the world.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of A Nan's (阿喃) Chinese webtoon of the same title.

data.title: Anata to Saigo
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Anata to Saigo, performed by Meychan.
